name: change_request_analysis
purpose: Analyze a change request from Requests placement, evaluate impact, and generate clarification questions in a consistent response format.

rules: Questions must be concrete and decision-oriented
Expected answer format must be explicit (for example: date, enum, formula, yes/no + note)
Do not ask questions when already answered in the change request
Identify impacted artifacts: BA requirements, use cases, entities, modules, architecture, source code, and tests
Classify impact by severity: high, medium, low
Separate gaps requiring clarification from deterministic implementation tasks
Prefer requirement-level statements in analysis; avoid jumping to implementation details prematurely
Do not modify design/source artifacts during this analysis command
